items.q: What does an original score cost?
items.a: Every project is scoped to what it needs. Send me your film and timeline and I'll come back with a clear quote.
Most projects run a few weeks. On a tight deadline? Tell me. I've delivered plenty of fast turnarounds.
Yes. I work with directors and brands anywhere, over shared links and quick calls.
You get fully original, cleared music licensed for your project. No stock, no surprises.

items.q: Can you match a reference track?
items.a: Absolutely. Send me the "can it sound like this?" and I'll make it yours.
